To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Additional Requirements Have to flexible with working hour. Must be able to stay Near Factory. Responsibilities & Context We are currently seeking an enthusiastic and motivated IT Assistant to join our IT department. The ideal candidate will have a strong passion for technology, excellent problem-solving skills, and a proactive attitude. As an IT Assistant, you will work closely with our IT team to ensure the smooth operation of our systems and provide support to end-users. Provide technical support to end-users, troubleshooting hardware and software issues. Assist in the installation, configuration, and maintenance of IT equipment and software. Must have knowledge on DVR/NVR and CC cameras. Camera Installing, Cabling and troubleshooting. Daily CCTV TV Monitoring. Skills & Expertise Suggested by End User Support Technical Support IT Software Installation Software Maintenance DVR Troubleshooting Compensation & Other Benefits As per company policy . Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Gazipur (Sreepur) Company Information A reputed Sweater factory Follow Business: Real Estate Developments. 100% Export oriented Ready-Made Garments. Printing & Packages. Officer - R & D (Analytical/Formulation) : The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List The White Horse Pharmaceuticals Ltd. Officer - R & D (Analytical/Formulation) Application Deadline : 26 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Gazipur Salary: Tk. 15000 - 20000 (Monthly) Published: 24 Feb 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Responsibilities & Context To Execute Analytical Method Development activities of drug products under development, based on QbD principles and regulatory requirements. Execution of Analytical Method validation activities for drug products as per the regulatory requirements. Execute routine Analytical Research activities of drug products. Establishing In-house systems and procedures to ensure cGLP practices & regulatory requirements for analytical activities at in-house R & D Facilities. Profile Description & Ability: Strong conceptual, analytical development and validation skills. Good communication (verbal, writing) and presentation skills. Must have ability to work under pressure, meet deadlines, and work on multiple projects simultaneously. Must be a team player and be able to interact with staff at all levels of the company and with external parties as well. Must have ability to work independently. Adequate Job knowledge and exposure to different Analytical methods and instrumentations. Adequate Job knowledge and exposure to QbD, DoE and statistical interpretation etc., Trouble shooting related to Testing methods, Stability studies, test results and designing of additional experimentation as necessary Execution & coordination for Analytical method transfer activities of drug products. Calibration of the Analytical instruments as per the master calibration schedule. Technical assessment & Analysis of drug substances (API) for projects execution. Review & clearance of technical documents leading to dossier batches executions and registrations. Preparation and review of Specifications, Method of analysis procedures and Analytical development reports. Preparation and review of analytical protocols and reports (Analytical method validation, Method feasibility, Analytical method transfer, etc.). Technical assessments of projects (Screening, pipeline and development projects stages) & Literature search). Preparation of analytical technical documents for dossier / Technology transfer executions / Regulatory submissions of projects. Assisting and resolving technical queries raised during Technology transfer activities & regulatory. submissions. Assisting in establishment of In-house Infrastructure (Analytical equipment`s Qualifications and preparation of SOP`s). Assessment & coordination on regulatory deficiencies. Assisting with analytical requirements in finalization

Intern (Paid) to Senior Marketing Executive : Niduslab Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Niduslab Intern (Paid) to Senior Marketing Executive Application Deadline : 25 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: 4 Age: 20 to 32 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Experience: 1 to 3 years Published: 27 Feb 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) in Marketing Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Computer Engineering Bachelor of Business Studies (BBS) Bachelor in Engineering (BEngg) Experience 1 to 3 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Direct Selling/Marketing Service Company, Market Research Firms Freshers are also encouraged to apply. Additional Requirements Age 20 to 32 years Responsibilities & Context Intern (Paid) → Senior Marketing Executive High-Performance Marketing Bootcamp Program Company: NidusLab Industry: AI-powered HR SaaS, Job Marketplace, Digital Solutions Location: Bangladesh Type: Full-time, On-site Program Nature: Structured Career Acceleration (Not a regular job) This Is Not for Everyone. This is a merit-driven, high-performance marketing bootcamp built to develop future marketing leaders inside NidusLab. If you want comfort, routine hours, or slow growth—this program is not for you. If you want accelerated responsibility, real execution, and leadership progression , read on. 🎯 Who This Program Is Designed For We are intentionally selective. We’re looking for candidates with hunger, discipline, and learning velocity : Fresh graduates Professionals with 1–2 years of experience Career switchers with a strong growth mindset Low-commitment applicants will self-filter here—and that’s by design. 📈 Structured Promotion Roadmap (Merit-Based) Your growth is measured by performance, output, and leadership potential —not tenure. 1️⃣ Intern (Paid) Duration: 6-8 months Stipend: BDT 10,000 2️⃣ Junior Marketing Executive (Probation) Duration: 6–8 months Salary: BDT 18,000–22,000 + performance incentives 3️⃣ Junior Marketing Executive (Confirmed) Duration: 12–18 months Salary: BDT 25,000–35,000 + performance incentives 4️⃣ Senior Marketing Executive Salary: BDT 40,000–60,000 + performance incentives ➡️ Promotions are earned. Every stage is performance-gated. 🎓 Education Requirement Bachelor’s degree in any discipline from a reputed institution Marketing or business background preferred , not mandatory 🛠 Core Skills We Expect (or Will Sharpen Fast) Canva & basic design execution Digital marketing fundamentals (content, performance, funnels) Video editing (short-form & promotional content) Clear communication & presentation Negotiation, outreach & lead engagement Strong willingness to learn and execute under pressure ⚡ Work Culture Transparency (Read Carefully) We value honesty over hype

Application Insights View Requirements Experience Additional Requirements Age 21 to 40 years Only Male প্রয়োজনীয় যোগ্যতা সংশ্লিষ্ট পদে চাকুরী করার অভিজ্ঞতা থাকতে হবে। বিদেশে কাজের অভিজ্ঞতা থাকলে সুবিধা পাবেন। বিশেষ করে জিসিসি দেশ সমুহে (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the United Arab Emirates) চাকুরী করার অভিজ্ঞতা থাকলে অগ্রাধিকার। ট্রেনিং বা সার্টিফিকেট থাকলে ভালো। ইংরেজি বা আরবি ভাষায় কথা বলতে পারলে অগ্রাধিকার। মিনিমাম এসএসসি পাস হতে হবে। Responsibilities & Context সৌদি আরবের জন্য নিয়োগ বিজ্ঞপ্তি- জেনারেল ওয়ার্কার সনামধন্য কোম্পানিতে দক্ষ ও অভিজ্ঞ কর্মী নিয়োগ দেওয়া হচ্ছে। কন্সট্রাকশন কোম্পানিতে (জেনারেল ওয়ার্কার) এর পদে নিয়োগ ট্রেনিং প্রাপ্ত এবং অভিজ্ঞদের অগ্রাধিকার। Skills & Expertise Scaffolding Steel Building Warehouse Welder Agriculture Carpenter Cleaning Construction Mason Plumber Compensation & Other Benefits Over time allowance Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize বেতন ও সুবিধা বেতন: ৩৫,০০০ - ১,২০,০০০ টাকা (পদ ও অভিজ্ঞতা অনুযায়ী) খাবার: বিনামূল্যে বাসস্থান: বিনামূল্যে ওভারটাইম: আছে Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 22 to 40 years Only Male Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Word and Adobe Photoshop . Strong ability in spelling and grammar, with excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and Bengali. A passion for digital content will add an advantage. Ability to manage time effectively, meet tight deadlines, and work both independently and as part of a team. Responsibilities & Context We are looking for an organized and creative Computer Operator Expert to work with our creative team. Responsibilities: Computer Operator, MS Word, MS Excel, and Adobe relate software. Can work in Data Entry, Data conversion, image-to-text conversion, Photoshop, Illustrator, etc. Should have a strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office Programs: MS Word, MS Excel, Photoshop, PowerPoint, & MS Access. Ability to perform basic computer troubleshooting , including printer setup, software installation, and internet issues Assisting in the creation, editing, proofreading, and publishing of various digital content (e.g., articles, descriptions, social media posts) across different platforms. Ensuring all published content adheres to high-quality standards, consistency, and brand guidelines. Maintaining and updating content on the Content Management System (CMS). Collaborating with the design team to ensure content visuals and promotions are aligned. Skills & Expertise Bangla and english typing Skills Computer Literacy Data Entry (Both English & Bengali) MS Office Production Suggested by Adobe Photoshop MS Office Compensation & Other Benefits T/A,Mobile bill,Tour allowance,Performance bonus,Profit share,Over time allowance Festival Bonus: 2 Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly 5% Increment per year. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply.
